tasks.title: Label threading — Outer loop passes `[P#/#N]` labels through to inner loop's `runSingleFeature`. GitHub issues and CLI banner show roadmap position.

gates.stdout:

> node --test test/*.test.mjs

  ⚠ approval.json has no valid integrity signature (_integrity mismatch) — treating as corrupt to prevent gate bypass.
▶ createApprovalIssue
  ✔ writes approval.json with issueNumber and pending status when issue creation succeeds (4.771709ms)
  ✔ returns null and does not write approval.json when createIssue fails (0.825583ms)
  ✔ still writes approval.json when addToProject returns null (board warning only) (0.969ms)
  ✔ skips project board calls when projectNumber is null (0.474625ms)
  ✔ reads SPEC.md content and passes it to createIssue as the body (0.3255ms)
  ✔ passes 'awaiting-approval' label to createIssue (0.365667ms)
  ✔ calls setProjectItemStatus with 'pending-approval' status when addToProject succeeds (0.438958ms)
✔ createApprovalIssue (9.605083ms)
▶ readApprovalState
  ✔ returns null when approval.json does not exist (0.156375ms)
  ✔ returns parsed object when approval.json is valid JSON with correct signature (0.278167ms)
  ✔ returns { corrupt: true } when approval.json is valid JSON but missing _integrity signature (0.513334ms)
  ✔ returns { corrupt: true } when approval.json contains invalid JSON (0.220166ms)
  ✔ corrupt state does not expose issueNumber (so outer loop skips create branch) (0.30375ms)
✔ readApprovalState (1.600334ms)
▶ waitForApproval
  ✔ prints issue URL before pausing when getIssueUrl returns a URL (0.319583ms)
  ✔ prints 'Waiting for approval (issue #N)...' before pausing (0.112458ms)
  ✔ returns 'approved' when getProjectItemStatus returns 'Ready' on first poll (801.875792ms)
  ✔ returns 'interrupted' immediately when getStoppingFn returns true before first poll (661.158792ms)
  ✔ polls multiple times before returning 'approved' (641.37125ms)
  ✔ returns 'interrupted' after sleep when stopping flag becomes true (652.470917ms)
  ✔ uses APPROVAL_POLL_INTERVAL env var as sleep interval (0.25525ms)
  ✔ defaults to 30000ms sleep when APPROVAL_POLL_INTERVAL is not set (0.16675ms)
  ✔ uses 30000ms default when APPROVAL_POLL_INTERVAL is invalid (0.14525ms)
  ✔ prints elapsed time
